# Shelterwood AI

> Shelterwood AI Inc. is a software company in Toronto, Canada, building
> well-crafted, AI-native software products — tools designed from the start
> around modern artificial intelligence and made to solve real problems for
> the people who use them. Its first product is Cuesheet, an app for
> indoor-cycling instructors. Founded by Peter Cresswell, a Waterloo-trained
> professional engineer (P.Eng) with a background in healthcare technology.

## Pages

- [About](https://shelterwood.ai/about/): The company, its approach, and the founder.
- [Products](https://shelterwood.ai/products/): What we build, starting with Cuesheet.
- [Contact](https://shelterwood.ai/contact/): How to reach Shelterwood AI Inc.

## Key Facts

- Incorporated in Canada as Shelterwood AI Inc.
- Registered office: 500 Richmond St W, Suite 126, Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Focus: AI-native software products
- Flagship product: Cuesheet (cuesheet.ca)
- Founded: 2026
- Contact: peter.cresswell@shelterwood.ai
